data.text: I'm writing a backup script that will preserve the wallpaper images and replace them with black SVGs, focusing on the wallpaper directory since that's what the user specified. reasoning_details.text: I'm writing a backup script that will preserve the wallpaper images and replace them with black SVGs, focusing on the wallpaper directory since that's what the user specified. The desktop-background symlink points to the wallpaper folder, so I'll target that location for the installation.

data.text: Now install them over the desktop wallpaper images, backing up the originals first. This needs your sudo password:

input.content:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
DEST=/usr/share/desktop-base/ceratopsian-theme/wallpaper/contents/images
SRC=/tmp/kilo/black-wallpapers
BACKUP=$DEST/original-backup

mkdir -p "$BACKUP"
for f in "$SRC"/*.svg; do
  name=$(basename "$f")
  if [ -f "$DEST/$name" ] && [ ! -f "$BACKUP/$name" ]; then
    cp -a "$DEST/$name" "$BACKUP/$name"
  fi
  cp "$f" "$DEST/$name"
done
echo "Done. Originals backed up in $BACKUP"
ls -la "$DEST"

+#!/bin/bash
+set -e
+DEST=/usr/share/desktop-base/ceratopsian-theme/wallpaper/contents/images
+SRC=/tmp/kilo/black-wallpapers
+BACKUP=$DEST/original-backup
+
+mkdir -p "$BACKUP"
+for f in "$SRC"/*.svg; do
+  name=$(basename "$f")
+  if [ -f "$DEST/$name" ] && [ ! -f "$BACKUP/$name" ]; then
+    cp -a "$DEST/$name" "$BACKUP/$name"
+  fi
+  cp "$f" "$DEST/$name"
+done
+echo "Done. Originals backed up in $BACKUP"
+ls -la "$DEST"

state.title: Generate black login SVGs

input.content:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
THEME=/usr/share/desktop-base/ceratopsian-theme
IMG_SRC=/tmp/kilo/black-wallpapers
LOGIN_SRC=/tmp/kilo/black-login

install_dir() {
  local src="$1" dest="$2"
  local backup="$dest/original-backup"
  mkdir -p "$backup"
  for f in "$src"/*.svg; do
    name=$(basename "$f")
    if [ -f "$dest/$name" ] && [ ! -f "$backup/$name" ]; then
      cp -a "$dest/$name" "$backup/$name"
    fi
    cp "$f" "$dest/$name"
  done
  echo "Updated: $dest (backup in $backup)"
}

# Desktop wallpaper
install_dir "$IMG_SRC" "$THEME/wallpaper/contents/images"
# Lockscreen (same resolution set)
install_dir "$IMG_SRC" "$THEME/lockscreen/contents/images"
# Login / GDM background (single dir)
install_dir "$LOGIN_SRC" "$THEME/login"

echo "All done."

-  cp "$f" "$DEST/$name"
-done
-echo "Done. Originals backed up in $BACKUP"
-ls -la "$DEST"
+install_dir() {
+  local src="$1" dest="$2"
+  local backup="$dest/original-backup"
+  mkdir -p "$backup"
+  for f in "$src"/*.svg; do
+    name=$(basename "$f")
+    if [ -f "$dest/$name" ] && [ ! -f "$backup/$name" ]; then
+      cp -a "$dest/$name" "$backup/$name"
+    fi
+    cp "$f" "$dest/$name"
+  done
+  echo "Updated: $dest (backup in $backup)"
+}
+
+# Desktop wallpaper
+install_dir "$IMG_SRC" "$THEME/wallpaper/contents/images"
+# Lockscreen (same resolution set)
+install_dir "$IMG_SRC" "$THEME/lockscreen/contents/images"
+# Login / GDM background (single dir)
+install_dir "$LOGIN_SRC" "$THEME/login"
+
+echo "All done."

@@ -1,16 +1,28 @@
 #!/bin/bash
 set -e
-DEST=/usr/share/desktop-base/ceratopsian-theme/wallpaper/contents/images
-SRC=/tmp/kilo/black-wallpapers
-BACKUP=$DEST/original-backup
+THEME=/usr/share/desktop-base/ceratopsian-theme

-mkdir -p "$BACKUP"
-for f in "$SRC"/*.svg; do
-  name=$(basename "$f")

-    cp -a "$DEST/$name" "$BACKUP/$name"
-  fi
-  cp "$f" "$DEST/$name"
-done
-echo "Done. Originals backed up in $BACKUP"
-ls -la "$DEST"
+install_dir() {
+  local src="$1" dest="$2"
+  local backup="$dest/original-backup"
+  mkdir -p "$backup"
+  for f in "$src"/*.svg; do
+    name=$(basename "$f")
+    if [ -f "$dest/$name" ] && [ ! -f "$backup/$name" ]; then
+      cp -a "$dest/$name" "$backup/$name"
+    fi
+    cp "$f" "$dest/$name"
+  done
+  echo "Updated: $dest (backup in $backup)"
+}
+
+# Desktop wallpaper
+install_dir "$IMG_SRC" "$THEME/wallpaper/contents/images"
+# Lockscreen (same resolution set)
+install_dir "$IMG_SRC" "$THEME/lockscreen/contents/images"
+# Login / GDM background (single dir)
+install_dir "$LOGIN_SRC" "$THEME/login"
+
+echo "All done."

state.title: Verify replacements and backups

data.text:
Done. All backgrounds in `/usr/share/images/desktop-base` (which are symlinks into the `ceratopsian-theme`) are now solid black.

What changed:
- **Desktop wallpaper** — all 6 resolution SVGs (`wallpaper/contents/images/`) replaced with black.
- **Lockscreen** — all 6 resolution SVGs (`lockscreen/contents/images/`) replaced with black.
- **Login/GDM** — `background.svg` and `background-nologo.svg` (`login/`) replaced with black.

Each new file is a minimal SVG (`<rect fill="#000000">`) at the exact original dimensions, so scaling stays correct.

Backups: the originals are preserved in an `original-backup/` folder inside each directory, e.g. `.../wallpaper/contents/images/original-backup/`.

Notes:
- Changes take effect on the next login or when the background is refreshed; an already-running session may need a re-login (or re-selecting the wallpaper) to show black.
- To revert any set, copy the files back from its `original-backup/` folder (needs sudo).

Want me to also create a quick revert script, or leave it as is?
